channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Nvidia billionaire Mark Stevens gives $200 million to alma mater USC for AI research
item.description: Nvidia director Mark Stevens and his wife Mary have donated $200 million to the University of Southern California to significantly advance AI research and education. This substantial gift aims to position USC as a national leader in AI, with plans for a new A… [Nvidia]

item.title: Samsung hits $1 trillion valuation driven by booming demand for AI chips, joins TSMC in elite club
item.description: Samsung Electronics Co. has reached a $1 trillion market valuation after booming demand for chips used in artificial intelligence saw the world’s largest memory maker’s stock more than quadruple over the past year. [TSMC, Samsung, Intel]

item.title: Nvidia to invest up to $3.2 billion in Corning as part of massive optical fiber deal with 3 new factories focused on AI - CNBC
item.description: Nvidia to invest up to $3.2 billion in Corning as part of massive optical fiber deal with 3 new factories focused on AI CNBC [Nvidia]

item.title: Memory supply gap stretches beyond 2028 as cloud capex tops US$725 billion
item.description: Global cloud service providers have recently raised capital spending to about US$725 billion, accelerating the shift of memory resources toward AI and prompting suppliers and customers to secure long-term agreements, or LTAs, three to five years in advance.

item.title: Korea's KOSPI breaks 7,000 as AI rally catapults Samsung into $1 trillion club
item.description: SEOUL, May 6 : South Korea's benchmark KOSPI index vaulted past 7,000 for the first time on Wednesday, as an AI-powered rally in semiconductor stocks drove Samsung Electronics past the $1 trillion market-cap barrier.The gains underscore how global demand for … [Samsung]

item.title: Peter Sarlin’s Qutwo hits $380m valuation in an angel round
item.description: After selling Silo AI to AMD for $665m, the Helsinki entrepreneur is doing it again. Qutwo’s angel round prices a quantum-classical orchestration layer with no quantum hardware shipping yet, and customers already paying tens of millions for it. There is a par… [AMD]

item.title: Samsung Electronics crosses $1tn, joining TSMC, as the AI memory cycle pulls Korea into a record
item.description: Samsung’s stock has more than quadrupled in a year. The KOSPI broke 7,000 for the first time. Two Korean chipmakers now account for 42% of the index. The supercycle that built this rally is, by Samsung’s own forecast, not yet at its peak. There is a particula… [TSMC, Samsung, ServiceNow]

item.title: Samsung hits $1 trillion valuation, joins TSMC’s elite club as AI chip boom powers record rally
item.description: Samsung Electronics has achieved a $1 trillion market valuation, driven by soaring demand for AI chips. The memory giant's stock has quadrupled, making it the second Asian firm after TSMC to reach this milestone. This surge highlights memory's structural role… [TSMC, Samsung]

item.title: Is Alphabet overtaking Nvidia? The AI chip king's reign is under threat
item.description: Alphabet is closing in on Nvidia's position as the world's most valuable company. Strong growth in Alphabet's cloud and AI businesses is driving this shift. The company is also developing its own AI chips, challenging Nvidia's dominance. Investors are watc… [Alphabet, Nvidia]

item.title: AMD forecasts revenue above expectations on strong AI demand, shares jump 12%
item.description: Advanced Micro Devices anticipates strong second-quarter revenue driven by high demand for its AI chips. The company's data center segment shows significant growth. However, competition is increasing from Intel, and a global memory chip shortage could affec… [Intel, AMD]

item.title: Infineon lifts 2026 outlook as AI demand boosts growth prospects
item.description: BERLIN, May 6 : Infineon Technologies raised its full-year guidance on Wednesday as demand for power supply solutions for AI data centers surged and automotive order intake improved, joining a wave of chipmakers benefiting from AI infrastructure spending.The …
